display.purpose: Hero headline only (index.html h1). Italic em in Liturgical Gold for emotional emphasis word.

headline.purpose: Interior page hero h1; CTA section headings like the Sunday CTA block.

title.purpose: Section h2 headings throughout the site. The workhorse heading level.

body.purpose: All prose. Line length 48–65ch. DM Sans at 1rem–1.125rem fluid.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, nav links, footer column heads, event tags. Uppercase tracking 0.12em.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Card hover state (leader cards). Appears only on hover, never at rest.

shadows.name: btn-navy-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover. Color matches the button itself — a glow, not a drop shadow.

shadows.name: btn-gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Gold button hover. Slightly warmer and more prominent.

shadows.name: nav-scroll
shadows.purpose: Navigation bar on scroll. Pairs with backdrop-filter: blur(12px).

shadows.name: focus-navy-ring
shadows.purpose: Input focus indicator. Used in addition to border-color change.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Standard easing for all state transitions. Exponential deceleration — no bounce, no spring.

motion.name: hero-cascade
motion.value: Staggered: tag 0.1s, heading 0.25s, sub 0.4s, actions 0.55s, card 0.45s
motion.purpose: Hero entrance sequence on page load. Body class hero-loaded triggers all.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Hero collapses to single-column; ministry grid shifts to 2-col; footer to 2-col.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Nav collapses to hamburger; welcome/about grids to 1-col; schedule time column narrowed.

breakpoints.name: xs
breakpoints.purpose: Hero/CTA actions stack vertically; leadership grid 2-col.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Used for Join Us Sunday, form submits, and primary conversion actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85em 1.75em; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: oklch(27% 0.075 248); color: oklch(99% 0.003 82); border: 1.5px solid oklch(27% 0.075 248); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(38% 0.065 248); border-color: oklch(38% 0.065 248); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 24px oklch(27% 0.075 248 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(67% 0.13 70); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Paired alongside Primary — never the sole action on a page.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85em 1.75em; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: transparent; color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); border: 1.5px solid oklch(27% 0.075 248); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 0.18s, color 0.18s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(27% 0.075 248); color: oklch(99% 0.003 82); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(67% 0.13 70); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: Festive CTA. Used sparingly in navy-background sections for the highest-priority action.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85em 1.75em; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: oklch(67% 0.13 70); color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); border: 1.5px solid oklch(67% 0.13 70); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 0.18s; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { background: oklch(62% 0.14 70); border-color: oklch(62% 0.14 70); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 24px oklch(67% 0.13 70 / 0.35); } .ds-btn-gold:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(27% 0.075 248); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Text fields and textareas on the Contact page. White on parchment background.
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); font-weight: 500; color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.85em 1em; background: oklch(99% 0.003 82); border: 1.5px solid oklch(88% 0.018 82); border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1rem, 0.92rem + 0.4vw, 1.125rem); color: oklch(13% 0.015 82); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(42% 0.014 82); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(27% 0.075 248 / 0.12); }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Pre-heading label used above section titles and hero headings. Always gold, always uppercase.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: block; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 0.7rem + 0.25vw, 0.875rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(67% 0.13 70); margin-bottom: 1rem; }

components.name: Schedule Event Row
components.description: A single event in the weekly schedule list. Featured variant carries gold indicator + amber tint.
components.html:
9:00 AM

Sunday Worship Service

All ages welcome. Contemporary worship with full band.

Featured
components.css: .ds-event { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; background: oklch(92.5% 0.014 82); border-radius: 4px; border-left: 3px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-event:hover { border-left-color: oklch(67% 0.13 70); background: oklch(92% 0.024 74); } .ds-event--featured { border-left-color: oklch(67% 0.13 70); background: oklch(94% 0.022 74); } .ds-event-time { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 1rem + 0.65vw, 1.375rem); font-weight: 600; color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); } .ds-event-name { font-weight: 500; color: oklch(13% 0.015 82); } .ds-event-desc { font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); color: oklch(42% 0.014 82); margin-top: 0.25rem; } .ds-event-tag { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 0.7rem + 0.25vw, 0.875rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(67% 0.13 70); background: oklch(90% 0.055 74); padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 100px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed header. Transparent at page top; frosted parchment with hair-line border after scroll.
components.html:
Fountain of Mercy
  • Home
  • About
  • Schedule
  • Programs
  • Contact
Join Us Sunday
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 80px; background: oklch(96.5% 0.009 82 / 0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 oklch(88% 0.018 82), 0 4px 24px oklch(13% 0.015 82 / 0.06); z-index: 100; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1320px; margin-inline: auto; padding-inline: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 4rem); height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 1rem + 0.65vw, 1.375rem); font-weight: 600; color: oklch(13% 0.015 82); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; list-style: none; margin-left: auto; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); font-weight: 400; color: oklch(13% 0.015 82); text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-links a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1px; background: oklch(67% 0.13 70); transition: width 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); } .ds-nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: Value Item
components.description: A value or FAQ item — full-width row with a top border accent that shifts color on hover.
components.html:
01

Community First

We believe in building relationships that outlast Sunday morning. Everyone belongs here.
components.css: .ds-value { padding: 2rem 0; border-top: 2px solid oklch(88% 0.018 82); transition: border-top-color 0.2s; } .ds-value:first-child { border-top-color: oklch(67% 0.13 70); } .ds-value:hover { border-top-color: oklch(52% 0.075 200); } .ds-value-num { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 1.75rem + 2.5vw, 4rem); font-weight: 700; color: oklch(80% 0.07 74); line-height: 1; display: block; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-value-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.375rem, 1.2rem + 0.9vw, 1.75rem); font-weight: 600; color: oklch(27% 0.075 248); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-value-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.875rem, 0.82rem + 0.28vw, 1rem); color: oklch(42% 0.014 82); line-height: 1.7; }

narrative.overview:
The Fountain of Mercy design system treats every screen the way a master printer treats a page: nothing placed without reason, every element considered at the level of craft that makes the reader feel the care behind it. Cormorant Garamond carries the weight of centuries — expressive, weighted, built for both intimate italic scripture and authoritative display headlines. DM Sans grounds body copy in clean modern clarity without ever reading corporate.

Every surface starts from warm parchment, not white. Sections shift through cream, parchment-deep, and vesper-navy in a rhythm that functions like turning pages. The navy sections feel like a printed cover: dark, confident, and set apart.
keyCharacteristics: Serif display leadership with high-contrast scale ratio (4–7× body to display)
Parchment-to-navy surface rhythm as the elevation system; shadows are state-only
Liturgical Gold as a precision pointing tool — never a fill, always a signal
Fluid clamp() type scale that maintains display drama across all viewport widths
Warm but unhurried; whitespace is hospitality, not emptiness

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Liturgical Gold appears on 15% or less of any surface. Use it to point — eyebrows, underlines, focus rings, rule lines, tags. The moment gold covers a large background area it loses all authority.

rules.name: The Warm Axis Rule
rules.body: Every neutral — text, backgrounds, borders — is tinted toward the 82° amber-gold hue axis (chroma 0.003–0.018). Introducing a neutral with zero chroma or a cold hue breaks the palette harmony immediately.

rules.name: The Italic Accent Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond italic is a design tool, not a grammatical marker. Reserve it for: emotionally important words in display headlines, scripture quotations, pullquotes. One or two words per heading maximum.

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: The jump from body (1rem) to display (3.5rem–8rem fluid) is 4–7×. This ratio is load-bearing. Compressing it to 'feel safe' is the primary way this system loses its character. If a heading feels too large, adjust spacing — not type size.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest flat. A shadow on a card at rest signals 'this is special' — which means everything cannot be special. Reserve lift for hover states and genuinely elevated overlays.

dos: Do use Cormorant Garamond at unmistakably large sizes for display and headline levels.
Do use the cream → parchment-deep → vesper-navy section rhythm to create depth.
Do apply Liturgical Gold only for pointing: eyebrows, underlines, focus rings, rule lines, tags.
Do cap body text line length at 48–65ch.
Do use var(--ease-out) (cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)) for all transitions.
Do ensure every interactive element has a 2px Liturgical Gold focus ring with 3px offset.
Do use Cormorant Garamond italic deliberately: hero emphasis, scripture, pullquotes. One or two words max.
donts: Don't use clip art, decorative crosses as visual filler, or soft-vignette stock imagery.
Don't add a dark mode. The parchment-to-navy rhythm is a light-mode-only system.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff). Every neutral is tinted toward the warm 82° hue axis.
Don't fill large backgrounds with Liturgical Gold.
Don't use a colored border-left greater than 1px as a decorative accent on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill).
Don't apply resting shadows to cards or containers. Shadows appear on hover only.
Don't compress the display type scale.
Don't reproduce the centrovida.com pattern: dense content, no whitespace, absent typographic hierarchy.
Don't use the hero-metric template (large number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't use identical card grids with repeated icon + heading + text at the same size.
